parameters.url: =http://frontend:8080/api/resource/RIFAH Lead/{{ $('State Machine Lead').item.json.actionData ? JSON.parse($('State Machine Lead').item.json.actionData).lead_id : '' }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "messaging_product": "whatsapp",
  "to": "{{ $('State Machine Lead').item.json.phone }}",
  "type": "text",
  "text": {
    "preview_url": false,
    "body": "✅ *Interest Submitted Successfully!*

🎉 Your response has been recorded for lead *{{ JSON.parse($('State Machine Lead').item.json.actionData || '{}').lead_id }}*.

📊 *Your Score:* {{ JSON.parse($('State Machine Lead').item.json.actionData || '{}').compatibility_score || 0 }}/100

⏳ *What happens next?*
• Our team will review your submission
• If selected, we will connect you with the buyer
• You'll be notified within 24-48 hours

_Thank you for using RIFAH Connect!_ 🙏"
  }
}
